title: Potion Icons Reworked
description: Potion Effects+ adds bright, custom potion and mob effect icons for a clear, vanilla-style experience. Simple, colorful, and easy to recognize.
body:
# 🧪 Potion Icons Reworked

**Potion Icons Reworked** enhances Minecraft’s potion and mob effect visuals with clean, colorful, and easy-to-recognize icons.  
Each potion gets a distinct, bright design that makes identifying effects simple — perfect for both PvP and survival players.

This resource pack keeps a **vanilla-like style** while improving **clarity, brightness, and gameplay readability**.  
Whether you're brewing, fighting, or exploring, **Potion Effects+** helps you instantly spot every effect without breaking Minecraft’s classic look.
---
![potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/a8O1lgYX/images/a15a510877d7db5baeaef777bc6b8afad392cf27.png)
---
## ✨ Features

- 🌈 **Custom potion and mob effect icons**  
- 💡 **Bright, minimal, and easy to read**  
- ⚙️ **Vanilla-like design for seamless integration**  
- 🧙 **Perfect for PvP, survival, and casual gameplay**
